name: Zus Health
description: Shared health data platform providing unified patient records to care teams via API, embedded UI components and direct EHR integrations.

seo.title: Zus Health — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Zus Health: Shared health data platform providing unified patient records to care teams via API, embedded UI components and direct EHR integrations.

when_to_use: Shared patient record API for care teams across providers
Unified patient clinical history from HIE and EHR sources
Embedded UI components for displaying patient records in apps
FHIR-backed health data platform for care management apps
Reducing clinician effort by surfacing complete patient context

pros: Unified patient record across EHRs and networks
Embeddable UI components speed app development
Founded by athenahealth veterans, deep domain chops
Active in TEFCA and national exchange networks
cons: Coverage depends on connected EHRs and networks
Pricing aimed at funded digital health companies
Data freshness varies by source integration
review.verdict: Fastest way for US digital health startups to get longitudinal patient records without building EHR integrations.
review.best_for: US digital health companies needing unified patient data via API and UI widgets
review.not_for: Non-US healthcare products or teams with existing FHIR infrastructure in-house

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
